name: Build auth URL
Exchange code → save tokens
Now playing
description: Get what is currently playing on Spotify. Returns track, artist, album, device, progress and playback state.

name: Get current player state
Play
description: Search for and play music on Spotify. Searches for the best match (track first, then album/playlist) and starts playback. Optionally target a specific device.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search query — artist, song, album or playlist name"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["track","album","playlist","artist"],"description":"Content type to search for (default: searches track, album and playlist)"},"uri":{"type":"string","description":"Spotify URI (e.g. spotify:track:xxx) — bypasses search and plays directly"},"device_id":{"type":"string","description":"Target device ID from spotify_get_devices — uses active device if omitted"}}}

name: Search + play
Pause
description: Pause Spotify playback on the active device.

name: Pause
Resume
description: Resume Spotify playback. Optionally specify a device to resume on.

name: Resume
Next track
description: Skip to the next track in the Spotify queue.

name: Next track
Previous track
description: Go back to the previous track in Spotify.

name: Previous track
Get devices
description: List all available Spotify Connect devices (speakers, phones, computers, Apple TV etc). Returns device IDs needed for spotify_play and spotify_transfer.

name: List devices
Transfer playback
description: Transfer Spotify playback to a different device. Use spotify_get_devices to find device IDs.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["device_id"],"properties":{"device_id":{"type":"string","description":"Target device ID from spotify_get_devices"},"play":{"type":"boolean","description":"Start playing immediately on transfer (default: true)"}}}

name: Transfer playback
Set volume
description: Set the volume on the active Spotify device (0-100).

name: Set volume
